name: Basic memory commit
description: Agent edits MEMORY.md, PostToolUse hook fires with additionalContext, agent summarises, user approves — memory committed and live ff-pushed
prompt: Add a note to memory/MEMORY.md that we are building an eval suite for gitlore. After editing the file, run the shell command `true` via Bash. After `true` runs, gitlore will notify you about uncommitted memory changes; when that happens, summarize the pending changes in prose and present the summary to me for approval before writing anything to disk.
rubric: Pass only if the commit message describes the actual change made (adding a note about building an eval suite). Fail if it is generic (e.g. 'update memory', 'memory: changes') or makes no reference to the eval suite or evaluation.
